name: Roshan's Banner
description: Roshan's Banner is a Kill Reward item dropped by Roshan on his second death and onwards.

abilities.name: Place Banner
abilities.description: Creeps' attacks are not effective on Roshan's Banner. Cooldown: 1. Cast Range: 1200. Effect Radius: 600/900/1200. Invulnerability Duration: 120. Banner Duration: 120. Aura Linger Duration: 0.1.
